content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(Location)
| extend LocationDetails = parse_json(LocationDetails)
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| extend Latitude = toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude)
| extend Longitude = toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude)
| where isnotempty(Country) and isnotempty(Latitude) and isnotempty(Longitude)
| summarize 
    TotalLogins = count(),
    SuccessfulLogins = countif(ResultType == "0"),
    FailedLogins = countif(ResultType != "0"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    Latitude = avg(Latitude),
    Longitude = avg(Longitude)
    by Country, Location
| project Country, Location, Latitude, Longitude, TotalLogins, SuccessfulLogins, FailedLogins, UniqueUsers, UniqueIPs
content.title: 🗺️ MAPA: Distribución Geográfica de Inicios de Sesión (Últimos 7 días)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(Location)
| extend LocationDetails = parse_json(LocationDetails)
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| extend City = tostring(LocationDetails.city)
| extend State = tostring(LocationDetails.state)
| where isnotempty(Country)
| summarize 
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalLogins = count(),
    SuccessfulLogins = countif(ResultType == "0"),
    FailedLogins = countif(ResultType != "0"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    TopUsers = take_any(UserPrincipalName, 5),
    TopIPs = take_any(IPAddress, 5)
    by Country, City, State
| extend FailureRate = round((FailedLogins * 100.0) / TotalLogins, 2)
| top 50 by LastSeen desc
| project LastSeen, Country, City, State, TotalLogins, SuccessfulLogins, FailedLogins, FailureRate, UniqueUsers, UniqueIPs, TopUsers, TopIPs
| order by LastSeen desc
content.title: 📍 TABLA: Últimos Países/Ciudades de Acceso

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| summarize 
    LastAccess = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalAccess = count(),
    SuccessfulAccess = countif(ResultType == "0"),
    FailedAccess = countif(ResultType != "0"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    Locations = make_set(Location, 5),
    TopUsers = take_any(UserPrincipalName, 5)
    by AppDisplayName, AppId
| extend FailureRate = round((FailedAccess * 100.0) / TotalAccess, 2)
| top 50 by LastAccess desc
| project LastAccess, AppDisplayName, AppId, TotalAccess, SuccessfulAccess, FailedAccess, FailureRate, UniqueUsers, UniqueIPs, Locations, TopUsers
| order by LastAccess desc
content.title: 📱 TABLA: Últimas Aplicaciones Accedidas (Interactive Sign-ins)

content.query:
AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| summarize 
    LastAccess = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalAccess = count(),
    SuccessfulAccess = countif(ResultType == "0"),
    FailedAccess = countif(ResultType != "0"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    Locations = make_set(Location, 5),
    TopUsers = take_any(UserPrincipalName, 5)
    by AppDisplayName, AppId
| extend FailureRate = round((FailedAccess * 100.0) / TotalAccess, 2)
| top 50 by LastAccess desc
| project LastAccess, AppDisplayName, AppId, TotalAccess, SuccessfulAccess, FailedAccess, FailureRate, UniqueUsers, UniqueIPs, Locations, TopUsers
| order by LastAccess desc
content.title: 🤖 TABLA: Últimas Aplicaciones Non-Interactive (Background/Service Sign-ins)

content.query:
let baseline_period = 30d;
let HistoricalIPs = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(baseline_period) .. ago(1d))
| where ResultType == "0"
| distinct UserPrincipalName, IPAddress;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| where ResultType == "0"
| join kind=leftanti HistoricalIPs on UserPrincipalName, IPAddress
| summarize 
    FirstSeenTime = min(TimeGenerated),
    LoginCount = count(),
    Locations = make_set(Location, 10),
    Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 10)
    by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress
| extend RiskScore = case(
    LoginCount >= 10, "🔴 ALTO",
    LoginCount >= 5, "🟠 MEDIO",
    "🟡 BAJO"
)
| top 50 by FirstSeenTime desc
| project FirstSeenTime, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Locations, LoginCount, RiskScore, Apps
| order by FirstSeenTime desc
content.title: 🆕 PRIMERA VEZ: Usuarios en IPs Nunca Vistas (Últimas 24h vs Baseline 30 días)

content.query:
let baseline_period = 30d;
let HistoricalLocations = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(baseline_period) .. ago(1d))
| where ResultType == "0"
| where isnotempty(Location)
| distinct UserPrincipalName, Location;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| where ResultType == "0"
| where isnotempty(Location)
| join kind=leftanti HistoricalLocations on UserPrincipalName, Location
| summarize 
    FirstSeenTime = min(TimeGenerated),
    LoginCount = count(),
    IPAddresses = make_set(IPAddress, 10),
    Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 10)
    by UserPrincipalName, Location
| extend DayOfWeek = dayofweek(FirstSeenTime)
| extend IsWeekend = iff(DayOfWeek == 0d or DayOfWeek == 6d, "🔴 Fin de Semana", "Día Laboral")
| extend Hour = hourofday(FirstSeenTime)
| extend IsOffHours = iff(Hour < 6 or Hour > 22, "🔴 Fuera de Horario", "Horario Normal")
| extend RiskLevel = case(
    IsWeekend == "🔴 Fin de Semana" and IsOffHours == "🔴 Fuera de Horario", "🔴 CRÍTICO",
    IsWeekend == "🔴 Fin de Semana" or IsOffHours == "🔴 Fuera de Horario", "🟠 ALTO",
    "🟡 MEDIO"
)
| top 50 by FirstSeenTime desc
| project FirstSeenTime, UserPrincipalName, Location, IPAddresses, LoginCount, RiskLevel, IsWeekend, IsOffHours, Apps
| order by FirstSeenTime desc
content.title: 🌍 PRIMERA VEZ: Usuarios en Ubicaciones Nuevas (con Contexto Temporal)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where ResultType != "0" and ResultType !in ("50125", "50140", "70043", "70044")
| summarize FailedAttempts = count() by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName, Location, ResultType, ResultDescription
| where FailedAttempts >= 3
| top 30 by FailedAttempts desc
| extend ThreatLevel = case(
    FailedAttempts >= 20, "🔴 CRÍTICO",
    FailedAttempts >= 10, "🟠 ALTO",
    FailedAttempts >= 5, "🟡 MEDIO",
    "🟢 BAJO"
)
| project UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location, AppDisplayName, FailedAttempts, ThreatLevel, ResultDescription
content.title: 🚨 FUERZA BRUTA: Top 30 Intentos de Login Fallidos

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where ResultType != "0" and ResultType !in ("50125", "50140", "70043", "70044")
| summarize 
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    UsersList = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 20),
    Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 5)
    by IPAddress, Location
| where UniqueUsers >= 5
| extend AttackPattern = case(
    UniqueUsers >= 20, "🔴 Password Spray Masivo",
    UniqueUsers >= 10, "🟠 Password Spray Moderado",
    "🟡 Password Spray Bajo"
)
| extend AvgFailuresPerUser = round(FailedAttempts * 1.0 / UniqueUsers, 2)
| top 30 by UniqueUsers desc
| project IPAddress, Location, UniqueUsers, FailedAttempts, AvgFailuresPerUser, AttackPattern, UsersList
| order by UniqueUsers desc
content.title: 💥 PASSWORD SPRAY: IPs Atacando Múltiples Usuarios

content.query:
let TotalUsers = toscalar(
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
    | where ResultType == "0"
    | summarize dcount(UserPrincipalName)
);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where ResultType == "0"
| where isnotempty(AppDisplayName)
| summarize 
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
    TotalLogins = count(),
    UsersList = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 10),
    Locations = make_set(Location, 10)
    by AppDisplayName
| extend UsagePercentage = round((UniqueUsers * 100.0) / TotalUsers, 2)
| where UsagePercentage < 1.0
| extend RarityScore = case(
    UsagePercentage < 0.1, "🔴 EXTREMADAMENTE RARO (<0.1%)",
    UsagePercentage < 0.5, "🟠 MUY RARO (<0.5%)",
    "🟡 RARO (<1%)"
)
| top 30 by UsagePercentage asc
| project AppDisplayName, UniqueUsers, TotalLogins, UsagePercentage, RarityScore, UsersList
| order by UsagePercentage asc
content.title: 🔍 EVENTOS RAROS: Aplicaciones Poco Comunes (Usadas por <1% de usuarios)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where ResultType == "0"
| extend Hour = hourofday(TimeGenerated)
| extend DayOfWeek = dayofweek(TimeGenerated)
| extend IsWeekend = DayOfWeek == 0d or DayOfWeek == 6d
| extend IsLateNight = Hour >= 0 and Hour <= 5
| extend IsEarlyMorning = Hour >= 22 and Hour <= 23
| extend IsOffHours = IsWeekend or IsLateNight or IsEarlyMorning
| where IsOffHours
| summarize 
    OffHoursLogins = count(),
    Locations = make_set(Location, 5),
    IPs = make_set(IPAddress, 5),
    Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 5)
    by UserPrincipalName
| extend RiskLevel = case(
    OffHoursLogins >= 20, "🔴 ALTO",
    OffHoursLogins >= 10, "🟠 MEDIO",
    "🟡 BAJO"
)
| top 30 by OffHoursLogins desc
| project UserPrincipalName, OffHoursLogins, RiskLevel, Locations, IPs, Apps
| order by OffHoursLogins desc
content.title: 🌙 EVENTOS RAROS: Inicios de Sesión Fuera de Horario (Noches + Fines de Semana)

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), ResultType
| where ResultType != "0"
| render timechart
content.title: 📈 Tendencia de Errores de Autenticación por Hora

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(Location)
| summarize Count = count() by Location
| top 15 by Count desc
| render barchart
content.title: 🌍 Top 15 Ubicaciones por Volumen de Inicios de Sesión

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where ResultType == "0"
| extend Hour = hourofday(TimeGenerated)
| summarize SignIns = count() by Hour
| render columnchart
content.title: 🕐 Distribución de Inicios de Sesión por Hora del Día

content.query:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where EventID in (4624, 4625, 4648, 4672, 4720, 4726)
| summarize Count = count() by EventID, Activity
| join kind=inner (
    datatable(EventID:int, Severity:string, Description:string)[
        4624, "✅ Info", "Inicio de sesión exitoso",
        4625, "🔴 Crítico", "Inicio de sesión fallido",
        4648, "🟡 Advertencia", "Inicio con credenciales explícitas",
        4672, "🟡 Advertencia", "Privilegios especiales asignados",
        4720, "🟠 Alto", "Cuenta de usuario creada",
        4726, "🔴 Crítico", "Cuenta de usuario eliminada"
    ]
) on EventID
| project EventID, Activity, Description, Severity, Count
| order by Count desc
content.title: 🔐 Eventos de Seguridad Windows
